summary: F2b frontend testing completed: 100% pass (7/7 tests). All F2b features (Future-aware ATP, Pending SO board, Delivery Hold) fully functional. Login fix from iteration_56 confirmed working - quick-login Admin button now auto-submits and navigates to dashboard successfully.
